mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_supervisor (sup_id, stu_id, start_date, end_date, is_primary) VALUES (#{supId}, #{stuId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{isPrimary})
mapper.select: SELECT id, sup_id, stu_id, start_date, end_date, is_primary, create_time, update_time FROM student_supervisor WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT ss.id AS relationId, ss.sup_id AS supId, ss.stu_id AS stuId, ss.start_date AS startDate, ss.end_date AS endDate, ss.is_primary AS isPrimary, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.user_id AS userId, up.name AS studentName, up.gender, c.college_name AS collegeName, m.major_name AS majorName, cl.class_name AS className, cl.grade FROM student_supervisor ss JOIN student s ON ss.stu_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON s.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN college c ON s.college_id = c.id LEFT JOIN major m ON s.major_id = m.id LEFT JOIN class cl ON s.class_id = cl.id WHERE ss.sup_id = #{supId} ORDER BY ss.start_date DESC

SELECT ss.id AS relationId, ss.sup_id AS supId, ss.stu_id AS stuId, ss.start_date AS startDate, ss.end_date AS endDate, ss.is_primary AS isPrimary, sv.supervisor_type AS supervisorType, t.employee_no AS employeeNo, t.title, u.id AS userId, up.name AS supervisorName, col.college_name AS collegeName, CASE sv.supervisor_type WHEN 1 THEN '学业导师' WHEN 2 THEN '论文导师' WHEN 3 THEN '实习导师' WHEN 4 THEN '班主任' ELSE '未知' END AS supervisorTypeName FROM student_supervisor ss JOIN supervisor sv ON ss.sup_id = sv.id JOIN teacher t ON sv.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up ON sv.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN college col ON t.college_id = col.id LEFT JOIN user u ON sv.user_id = u.id WHERE ss.stu_id = #{stuId} ORDER BY ss.is_primary DESC, ss.start_date DESC

SELECT ss.id AS relationId, ss.sup_id AS supId, ss.stu_id AS stuId, ss.start_date AS startDate, ss.end_date AS endDate, ss.is_primary AS isPrimary, sv.supervisor_type AS supervisorType, up_sup.name AS supervisorName, s.student_no AS studentNo, up_stu.name AS studentName, up_stu.user_id AS studentUserId FROM student_supervisor ss JOIN supervisor sv ON ss.sup_id = sv.id JOIN student s ON ss.stu_id = s.id LEFT JOIN user_profile up_sup ON sv.user_id = up_sup.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profile up_stu ON s.user_id = up_stu.user_id ORDER BY ss.create_time DESC
SELECT id, sup_id, stu_id, start_date, end_date, is_primary, create_time, update_time FROM student_supervisor WHERE sup_id = #{supId} AND stu_id = #{stuId} AND end_date IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT stu_id FROM student_supervisor WHERE sup_id = #{supId} AND end_date IS NULL
